lines.content: Hey, Chris, this is Chris with Einstein Moving Company. I'm the branch manager, how are you doing today?
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: I'm doing well. How are you?
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Doing good. I wanted to reach out and see if you had some time to talk to me about the move. That's now completed finally but just about the further discount we wanted to provide.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Sure. Yeah, I've got some time.
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Okay, perfect. So as, I mean, the second day we did not charge anything for that took about 5.75 hours. So that portion of the discount which has already been offered that came out to $1,173 the additional discount that we wanted to offer for day one, I did review the virtual walk through that one of our colleagues did as well. And it just, we didn't set this move up for success. I would say there's kind of some blame on both, both sides but mainly on us and I can kind of cover that in a second. But the day one came out to 10.75 hours what I wanted to do in addition to the free moving services that we did. I wanted to refund 1.5 hours back to that day, so at 612 per hour times 1.5 that would be $918 an additional refund. Coming back to your credit card.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Yeah, so a total total discount for the free day and then the 1.5. Back it would come out to $2,091.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Bringing the budget down to $5,661 versus the $4,896 that we estimated.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Okay. Yeah, I think that's fair and reasonable. Yeah, while I have you on the phone I mean, we're still unpacking boxes but we're pretty close to finishing up, and we've looked everywhere for a kitchen items so there were, we had some pots and pans and some other items that we're not seeing, so I don't know if there's a way you could check the truck just to kind of make sure we'll keep looking.
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Yeah, I can definitely, yeah, I can definitely check we do a truck resets after each job. So I can see if anything's come back. But nothing is at our office at this point, actually cleaned out our warehouse yesterday and didn't see anything. I assume, I mean, just with the amount of small miscellaneous stuff that you did have going, I mean, it, I would assume it's on site somewhere. Maybe just tucked in somewhere hard to find. So, definitely, give that some more time. I mean, if you still can't find it, we really don't have a cut off on and submitted any kind of claim. So, if it's still not recovered, you know, double back to us and we can go from there.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Okay, sounds good. What was that total again? That way I just have something written down.
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Yeah. Yeah, yeah, so the original estimate was $4,896 with a full discount that brings you down to $5,661 so instead of 10.75 hours available, we're just maintaining 9.25 hours available at the 612 and, yeah, that brought it to the roughly $5,600.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Okay, perfect. Well I appreciate you giving us the time to you know, get this resolved for us. I didn't catch this before but you have moved with us quite a bit it looks like all the way since like 2018.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: No, I have not, I've never used Einstein moving before. I, I've only used three man three new movers.
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Oh, okay. Well then, then we just have a lot of Chris webs and okay, gotcha. Well then, we just have a bunch of Chris webs in our system but either way repeat customer first time customer, we wanna make sure to treat you right at the end of the day.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Yeah, I appreciate that and did you get my text about Shay and Alistair?
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Yes, so I kinda got it through the great vine but it sounds like they blew this out of the water with kind of clean and everything up and reset an expectations.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Yes, yeah absolutely. Yeah, I sent it maybe, I don't know maybe it was like an automated message or something. I mean it didn't receive replies but yeah, I wanted to commend their work and I wanted to make sure that you knew how great they were basically. So the only, the only other thing was I was, you know I, I'm sure Daniel probably told you I was going to have to submit a reimbursement for our mattress well turns out that the crew, yeah that on day one.
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: I did not install the box spring correctly. So that was the, that was it, that was the issue. So, when Shay AIS came in, you know, we have like a queen mattress who are going to use in the meantime me, while I was getting the new mattress and out there like, hey, I've never seen this before either. It looks weird maybe let's, you know, take a look at it. And like, yeah, sure enough, they flipped it and everything was good to go. So, you know, they save you, yeah, exactly, and they saved you guys, you know, $1,200. So I just wanna make sure. Yes, yeah. So I wanna pass that along and make sure you know, when bonus time comes around that, you know, those guys did some fantastic work.
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Mm-hmm nice. Easy, easy fix there.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Awesome. I do appreciate that and again I've already gave them kind of praise just with the you know, the clean up that they had to do and definitely appreciate you just giving them some extra praise.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Yeah, absolutely. Well thank you so much for making it. Right and I really do appreciate it.
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Yeah, you're welcome and we'll work on getting that issued back to the credit card you paid with and usually takes about two to three business days to hit your account.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Okay, sounds great. I'll, do you need anything else from me?
lines.name: Webb Chris

lines.content: Nope, you're good to go. I guess just if you can't find the kitchen stuff, just let us know and we can kind of, go from there.
lines.name: Chris Anderson

lines.content: Okay, thanks so much. Have a great rest of the day.
lines.name: Webb Chris
